debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ D < @DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB''

failed_attempts:
by
  rw [lt_iff_le_not_le]
  refine ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', ?_⟩
  intro h_le
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_eq : ∀ b ∈ B N hN, b = N := by
    intro b hb
    have hb_in : b ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
      simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]
      exact ⟨N, ⟨hN, hb⟩⟩
    obtain ⟨S, hS_sub, hb_eq_sup⟩ := h_le hb_in
    have h_le_N : b ≤ N := by
      rw [hB N hN]
      exact le_sSup hb
    have hN_in_S : N ∈ S := by
      by_contra h_not_mem
      have h_disj : Disjoint N (sSup S) :=
        sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup D.sSupIndep hN hS_sub h_not_mem
      have h_le_sup : b ≤ sSup S := le_of_eq hb_eq_sup
      have h_b_bot : b = ⊥ := Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_disj h_le_N h_le_sup
      exact hB'' N hN hb h_b_bot
    rw [hb_eq_sup]
    exact le_antisymm h_le_N (le_sSup hN_in_S)
  apply h_ne
  apply Set.eq_singleton_of_forall_mem_eq h_eq
  by_contra h_empty
  rw [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at h_empty
  have : N = ⊥ := by
    rw [hB N hN, h_empty, sSup_empty]
  exact D.not_bot_mem hN this
